eras.title: Choose an Era
eras.comingSoonDesc: Questions for this era are coming soon. Stay curious!

ancient-age.name: Ancient Age
ancient-age.description: Pyramids, philosophers, and emperors shaped the foundations of civilization.

middle-ages.name: Middle Ages
middle-ages.description: Kingdoms, crusades, and cathedrals defined a thousand years of history.

early-modern.name: Early Modern
early-modern.description: Renaissance, exploration, and revolution transformed the world.

modern-era.name: Modern Era
modern-era.description: Industry, wars, and technology shaped the contemporary world.

messages.low: Keep exploring! Every journey begins with curiosity.
messages.medium: Good effort! History reveals itself to those who seek it.
messages.high: Excellent! You're a true student of history.
messages.perfect: Flawless! The chronicles of time bow to you.
